body_txt: Hand Rubbing is the act of rubbing the palms of your hands together. The friction of the gesture can be used to provide heat in a cold environment, or it can simply convey excitation, eagerness or expectation. The Other Wiki has a whole article on the subject, but here, we will focus on rubbing hands as a trope. There is an eerie specificity in fiction to reserve this gesture for Smug Snake type villains. Used car salesmen , lower-end Corrupt Corporate Executives and the Dastardly Whiplash will gleefully rub their hands when things are going their way, but a true Magnificent Bastard always opts to clasp his hands instead. In a bygone age , it was also the signature habit of the Greedy Jew . In Japanese productions, this is usually the sign of a Professional Butt-Kisser . Even when otherwise positive characters do this, there's nearly always a sinister undercurrent - unless, for some reason, they are a craftsperson starting a job.
